About this item

Product details

Dogs bring out the good in us. Pedigree brings out the good in them. This pet food provides wholesome nutrition to every adult dog. Offering 36 vitamins, minerals, and amino acids, this dog food for adult dogs supports overall health including muscle strength and vitality. With high-quality protein, prebiotic fiber, Omega-6 Fatty Acid, and Zinc, it enriches your pet's diet, promoting lean muscles and a healthy skin and coat. Made without high fructose corn syrup, artificial flavors, or added sugars, this dog food prioritizes purity and great taste. Pedigree Adult Dry Dog Food is 100% complete and balanced, providing essential nutrients that support everyday health for your dog. This highly digestible formula includes prebiotic fibers to support healthy digestion, ensuring your pet thrives while feeling their best. Additionally, omega 6 fatty acid in the recipe helps nourish a healthy skin and coat, supporting healthy skin and coat maintenance.
  • Pedigree dry food for dogs is a 100% complete and balanced dog food
  • Supports lean muscle with high-quality protein
  • Made with 36 vitamins, minerals, and amino acids to support your dog’s health and vitality
  • Made with only natural flavors and includes prebiotic fibers to support healthy digestion
  • Enriched with Omega 6 Fatty Acid and Zinc to help nourish a healthy skin and coat
  • Supports healthy nutrition for adult dogs
info:
We aim to show you accurate product information. Manufacturers, suppliers and others provide what you see here, and we have not verified it.  

Specifications

Animal lifestage

Adult

Pet food flavor

Chicken and Vegetable

Pet food condition

Dry

Pet food form

Kibble

Indications

Animal Health Concern

Dental Care Immune Support Skin Care Coat Care

Directions

Instructions

RECOMMENDED DAILY FEEDING GUIDE FOR ADULT DOGS*WEIGHT OF ADULT DOG CUPS PER DAY MIX WITH POUCHUp to 10 lb 1/2 to 1 Replace ¼ cup for each10 to 25 1 to 1 ¾ 3.5 oz of PEDIGREE® Pouch25 to 50 1 ¾ to 350 to 75 3 to 475 to 150 4 to 6 3/41 cup = 8 oz measuring cup, 1 can = 13.2 ozMIXING WITH CANNED?Replace 1/2 cup for each 1/2 can of PEDIGREE® CHOICE CUTS™ In Gravy.*An individual dog's requirements may differ from this guide.Store in a cool, dry place. Keep fresh water available.For more information, visit www.pedigree.com.

Feeding Instructions

RECOMMENDED DAILY FEEDING GUIDE FOR ADULT DOGS* WEIGHT OF ADULT DOG CUPS PER DAY MIX WITH POUCH Up to 10 LBS 1/2 to 3/4 Replace ¼ cup for each 10 to 25 LBS 3/4 to 1 2/3 3.5 oz of PEDIGREE® Pouch 25 to 50 LBS 1 2/3 to 2 3/4 50 to 75 LBS 2 3/4 to 3 3/4 75 to 100 LBS 3 3/4 to 4 3/4 add 1/3 cup for every 10 LBS over 100 LBS 1 cup = 8 oz measuring cup, 1 can = 13.2 oz MIXING WITH CANNED? Replace 1/2 cup for each 1/2 can of PEDIGREE® CHOICE CUTS™ In Gravy. *An individual dog's requirements may differ from this guide. Store in a cool, dry place. Keep fresh water available. For more information, visit www.pedigree.com. Transitioning to Our Food: Gradually mix in the new food over a 4 day period, increasing the amount of PEDIGREE(R) Adult Dog Food each day.

Ingredients

Ingredients

INGREDIENTS: Ground Whole Grain Corn, Meat and Bone Meal, Soybean Meal, Animal Fat (Source of Omega 6 Fatty Acids [Preserved with BHA and Citric Acid]), Ground Whole Grain Wheat, Corn Protein Meal, Natural Flavor (Source of Roasted Chicken Flavor), Dried Plain Beet Pulp, Salt, BHA (Preservative), Citric Acid (Preservative), Potassium Chloride, Choline Chloride, DL-Methionine, Calcium Carbonate, Dried Peas, Zinc Sulfate, Vitamin E Supplement, L-Tryptophan, Dried Carrots, Red 40, Yellow 5, Yellow 6, Blue 2, Niacin Supplement (Vitamin B3), D-Calcium Pantothenate (Vitamin B5), Copper Sulfate, Sodium Selenite, Potassium Iodide, Vitamin A Supplement, Riboflavin Supplement (Vitamin B2), Vitamin B12 Supplement, Thiamine Mononitrate (Vitamin B1), Vitamin D3 Supplement, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride (Vitamin B6), Folic Acid.

Active Ingredient Name

Ground Whole Grain Corn, Meat and Bone Meal, Soybean Meal, Animal Fat (Source of Omega 6 Fatty Acids [Preserved with BHA and Citric Acid]), Ground Whole Grain Wheat, Corn Protein Meal, Natural Flavor (Source of Roasted Chicken Flavor), Dried Plain Beet Pulp, Salt, BHA (Preservative), Citric Acid (Preservative), Potassium Chloride, Choline Chloride, DL-Methionine, Calcium Carbonate, Dried Peas, Zinc Sulfate, Vitamin E Supplement, L-Tryptophan, Dried Carrots, Red 40, Yellow 5, Yellow 6, Blue 2, Niacin Supplement (Vitamin B3), D-Calcium Pantothenate (Vitamin B5), Copper Sulfate, Sodium Selenite, Potassium Iodide, Vitamin A Supplement, Riboflavin Supplement (Vitamin B2), Vitamin B12 Supplement, Thiamine Mononitrate (Vitamin B1), Vitamin D3 Supplement, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride (Vitamin B6), Folic Acid.

Oct 30, 2025
andy
Top Reviewer
Item details
Size: 30 lbs
5 out of 5 stars review

Verified Purchase

Ralphie loves it

I'm 75 and my Ralphie is going to be two he is part shepherd and Pitbull weighs about 60 lb when I fix his dinner I mix strawberries or bananas in with the pedigree or I fix it with two scoops of wet pedigree it's gone in 5 minutes I also fix his pedigree with an egg in the morning he loves it I rescued him from the pound and I'm glad I did because he's turning out to be a wonderful dog and best friend

Helpful?5H87N33P4XGN247602047
Apr 23, 2026
Rainman9902
Item details
Size: 40 lbs
5 out of 5 stars review

Verified Purchase

A GOOD BUY FOR YOUR MONEY!

Originally we fed our two doggies this food and they loved it. Since then both have passed over the Rainbow Bridge after long and happy lives with us. Dione was 11 and Phoebe was 14. We have since begun feeding the fox families that inhabit our local woods behind our property and they love it too. We purchase a 40 pound bag once a month and the value is first rate.
